prompts.name: ANTIGRAVITY Planning Agent Prompt
prompts.purpose: Instructs the ANTIGRAVITY planning agent on how to use lint_plan, save_plan, and begin_session to draft and cryptographically sign governance-compliant Level-5 plans.

prompts.name: WINDSURF Execution Agent Prompt
prompts.purpose: Instructs the WINDSURF execution agent on how to read plans from docs/plans/<signature>.md, generate .intent.md artifacts, and execute audited writes using write_file.

prompts.name: Plan Scaffold Template
prompts.purpose: A pre-formatted 7-section skeleton ensuring that plans meet the strict Spectral linting validation rules mandated by the Level-5 continuous assurance architecture.

prompts.name: Prompt Templates Index
prompts.purpose: Central directory summarizing agent roles, assigned MCP tools, and example execution workflows for the v2 signature-based governance system.
